experiment: GPT-4o main table with LLM Judge (GPT-4o-mini)

comparison_heuristic_vs_llm.note: LLM judge gives similar ASR (20.0 vs 19.2) but HIGHER TCR (65.0 vs 58.3) - fewer false escalations. L4-ASR slightly better (1.7 vs 3.3). L2-ASR slightly worse (38.3 vs 35.0). RTV-Only latency now 1131ms (LLM call) vs 0.1ms (heuristic).

key_findings: LLM judge TCR improved: 65.0% vs 58.3% (heuristic) - fewer false positives on benign
LLM judge ASR similar: 20.0% vs 19.2% (heuristic) - detection capability unchanged
RTV-Only now shows L4-ASR=35.0% (was 71.7% with heuristic) - LLM judge detects some L4 attacks
T3 (cross-session) improved: RG ASR=25% (was 40%) - LLM judge better at detecting memory poisoning
PI improved: RG ASR=5% (was 10%) - LLM judge catches more parameter injections
Latency: RTV-Only=1131ms, RG=672ms (LLM judge adds ~600ms per RTV check)
